title: Rotate Image
prompt:
You are given an `n x n` 2D `matrix` representing an image. Rotate the image by 90 degrees clockwise.

You may perform the operation in-place, modifying the input 2D matrix directly.

Return the rotated matrix.

notesForAI.coreIdea: Transpose the matrix (swap matrix[i][j] with matrix[j][i]), then reverse each row. Alternatively, rotate four cells at a time layer by layer from outside in.
commonBugs: Transposing the full matrix instead of only the upper triangle (double-swapping)
Reversing columns instead of rows after transpose (gives counter-clockwise rotation)
Off-by-one errors in the layer-by-layer approach
